reviews.review_description:
This one is a bit different, but Im enjoying it a lot.  The controls are a bit tricky so here is my overview:

Gamepad seems to be supported, but only kind of.  Up on the joystick changes view and one button is used for go.  A double tap (VERY QUICKLY!) Will change you from accellerating mostly up to mostly forward.  This mimics touchpad play identically. 

Its still still look to steer, but with a swivel chair or standing it works. Think a faster version of omega agent, but without any real gameplay. There is a basic tutorial and a couple tests or trials you can run, then a basic arena and and endless city. 

If you want to drive on the ground you need to look down a bit as the forward accelleration mode has a bit of up to it.  I bet that part is hard to fine tune, its not a deal breaker. 

Ultimately Im happy because I dont have anything else like it, with Omega Agent probably being the closest.  Or fusion wars maybe, but you can fly?

The drift and color customizations and stuff are all nice.

reviews.review_title: Great for people used  to the motion
reviews.review_description: So good unfortunate i get motion sick hope im cured of that when this technology peaks i didnt read the comfort level hahahah i feel sick
If it doesn't work on your vr you are out if luck no refund allowed... Buy at your own risk...
Seems like a less than half baked game.

Not so much a game, more of a relaxing and challenging experience once you get the hang of how to control the car. It's fun to switch between hover and forward movement learning how to land on the various levels of the buildings. Infinty mode is the best where you just cruise around an endless repeating city.
I like it better than the hang glider game 'vertigo' in which you fly around a city sky line but can't actually land on anything.
Good value and well made.
